case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. ANGELINA TALAG ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TALAG, ANGELINA $4,559.08 PRINCIPAL, $296.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,855.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 65756710)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TALAG, ANGELINA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2020
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 64811658), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SERVED MAR-07-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TALAG, ANGELINA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 66432298) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TALAG, ANGELINA
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 65754604) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TALAG, ANGELINA

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $296.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $912.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 65756710) AS TO DEFENDANT TALAG, ANGELINA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65756710) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
